title: out in the wild
description: Lyrics from out in the wild
body:
))}}

[stream 10062021 - out in the wild by billy | listen online for free on soundcloud](https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/10062021-out-in-the-wild)

[core own us | bjorn vader](https://bjornvader.bandcamp.com/track/core-own-us)

i don't wanna clock out
i don't want a clock
out in the wild
we'll tell time with a rock
i just wanna rock out
on the ground for a while
i don't wanna drop out
i just wanna drop
out in the wild
next to the mountain
with the sage on top
while y'all busy countin
we climb to summit
the world's a stage
and the play's on top
lines line the page
we go off book to run it
i don't wanna cop out
i don't wanna cop out in the wild
when i'm trying to run it
the underground is down
i found a way in and i'm trying to plumb it
i don't wanna walk out
i don't wanna walk out in the wild
i'm here to dig and leave behind piles
i fly too i can see for miles
am i you i can only answer with smiles
i don't wanna act out
i don't wanna act out in the wild
where the nights are black
and the days you can't black out
after a while you try to find a way back out
but there's no back out in the wild
i don't wanna break out
i wanna break out in the wild
where the cries call eyes for miles
prey loud enough the predator smiles
